# The Sports Room (TSR)

A human-authored digital sports journalism platform delivering tactical analysis, sports science insights, match coverage, and structured sports data across cricket, football, Formula 1, tennis, basketball, esports, volleyball, and hockey.

---

## Site Purpose

TSR is a sports intelligence and editorial platform combining:

- Match reporting
- Tactical analysis
- Biomechanics & sports science
- Fixtures & rankings data
- Player and team profiling
- Historical and live sports context

---

## Core Navigation

- [Home](/) — Main feed of sports stories, featured analysis, and breaking updates
- [Sports Science Atlas](/sports-atlas) — Biomechanics, physics, and performance science in sport
- [Rankings](/rankings) — Official standings across leagues and tournaments
- [Fixtures](/fixtures) — Upcoming matches, schedules, and venue data
- [About Us](/about-us) — Editorial mission and content philosophy
- [Contact Us](/contact-us) — Submissions, corrections, and inquiries

---

## Sport Sections

### Cricket
- /sport/cricket  
Coverage of Pakistan cricket, PSL, ICC events, player technique analysis, pitch conditions, and match breakdowns.

Key topics:
- Pakistan national team
- PSL analysis
- Babar Azam batting mechanics
- Shaheen Afridi bowling dynamics
- ICC rankings and tournaments

---

### Football
- /sport/football  
Tactical analysis, league coverage, and international competitions.

Key topics:
- Premier League
- UEFA competitions
- FIFA World Cup 2026
- Player tactics and formations

---

### Formula 1
- /sport/f1  
Race analysis, engineering insights, and performance data.

Key topics:
- Aerodynamics and ground effect
- Race strategies
- Pit stop performance
- Driver analytics

---

### Tennis
- /sport/tennis  
ATP/WTA coverage and match breakdowns.

Key topics:
- Roland Garros 2026
- Surface-based tactics
- Player rankings and qualifiers

---

### Basketball
- /sport/basketball  
NBA coverage, strategy breakdowns, and analytics.

Key topics:
- Team standings
- Draft analysis
- Offensive/defensive systems

---

### Esports
- /sport/esports  
Competitive gaming coverage and meta analysis.

Key topics:
- League of Legends Worlds
- Valorant VCT
- CS2 competitive economy

---

### Volleyball
- /sport/volleyball  
International volleyball competitions and rankings.

---

### Hockey
- /sport/hockey  
Field hockey analysis, regional competitions, and biomechanics.

---

## Content Types

- News Articles
- Match Reports
- Tactical Analysis
- Player Profiles
- Statistical Breakdowns
- Sports Science Research
- Fixtures & Scheduling Data
- Rankings & Standings

---

## Core Entities

### Cricket
- Babar Azam — Pakistan national team batsman
- Shaheen Afridi — Pakistan fast bowler
- PSL — Pakistan Super League
- ICC — International Cricket Council

### Football
- FIFA — International football governing body
- UEFA — European football federation

### Motorsport
- Formula 1 — Global motorsport championship

### Esports
- Riot Games titles (LoL, Valorant ecosystems)
- Valve CS2 competitive system

---

## Data & System Architecture

- `src/lib/db.ts` → Primary content database (articles, fixtures, rankings)
- `/glossary` → Entity index + semantic search layer
- `/sports-atlas` → Sports science knowledge base
- `SEOMetaTags.tsx` → Structured metadata + JSON-LD generation

---

## Indexing & Crawl Priority

- High priority:
  - /sport/*
  - /fixtures
  - /rankings

- Medium priority:
  - /sports-atlas
  - /glossary

- Evergreen:
  - /about-us
  - /contact-us

---

## Update Frequency

- News content → real-time / daily
- Fixtures → daily updates
- Rankings → weekly updates
- Atlas content → evergreen / rarely updated

---

## SEO & Structured Data Notes

TSR uses structured schema types:

- WebSite
- NewsArticle
- CollectionPage
- DefinedTermSet
- SportsEvent (where applicable)

All metadata is generated dynamically via frontend rendering and SEO component injection.

---

## Design & Content Philosophy

TSR prioritizes:

- Human-authored sports journalism
- Tactical depth over clickbait
- Data-informed storytelling
- Scientific explanation of athletic performance
- Clean semantic structure for AI + search indexing

---
